rationale: Educ. Code §38.009 governs school personnel access to student medical records. It is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 38.009. ACCESS TO MEDICAL RECORDS. (a) A school administrator, nurse, or teacher is entitled to access to a student's medical records maintained by the school district for reasons determined by district policy.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and this medical records statute.
